title: iris fulva f. fulvaurea
intro: Iris fulva f. fulvaurea, also known as the American Orange Iris, is a plant species that belongs to the iris family and is native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Iris fulva f. fulvaurea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and support digestive health, among others. Herbal preparations of Iris fulva f. fulvaurea can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
